title: Network Flow, Cuts, and Bipartite Matching · Algorithm Stakeholder Mission
summary: A staffing group needs feasible assignments and transparent tradeoffs. Compare greedy, dynamic-programming, search, and flow models on changed constraints. Planned artifact: Deliver Constraint and Allocation Optimizer with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model longest-common-subsequence and edit-distance choices with boundary rows and reconstruction.
Distinguish zero-one, unbounded, subset-sum, and value-indexed knapsack states.
Compress DP rows only when overwritten states are no longer needed.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
